homepage.title: L&K Rollen-L&K Rollen GmbH
homepage.description: L&K Rollen GmbH was founded in 2022 at the Sirius Business Park Waldhof in Offenbach in Hesse. The company's product castors are mainly used in logistics equipment, storage equipment, food processing equipment, supermarket trolleys, etc. For different industries, we provide the most suitable castors, which can give production enterprises the best advantages of products and work efficiency.
homepage.text_excerpt:
L&K Rollen-L&K Rollen GmbH
We have a wide variety of castor sales, and the order of the same day can be sent as soon as possible.
Castor quality is
our foundation
L&k Roller GmbH is a supplier of castors located in Frankfurt, Germany.
We are committed to providing satisfied customers with industrial castors, heavy duty castors, flight case castors, roll cage castors and solutions.
More About Castors
What kind of castors do you need?
Contact Sales Manager Now
Industrial Castors Series
Our high-quality industrial medium-sized casters and wheel series will let you choose the castor that best suit your needs. Rubber, nylon and polyurethane are selected as wheel materials and metal frames.
Browse More
Heavy Duty Castors Series
Our heavy and super heavy castor series are designed to transport loads, usually from 150 kg to more than 1.5 ton. Brake and directional lock casters are included in our heavy-duty castor series.
Browse More
Institutional Castors Series
Institutional castors, swivel, brake and fixed options. These pressed steel castors are zinc plated to resist corrosion.
Browse More
Stainless Steel Castors Series
Supply stainless steel castors ranging from 100mm to 200mm, with a wide selection and inventory available for quick delivery.
Browse More
Heat Resistant Castors Series
Supply heat-resistant castors, ranging from -40 ℃ to +260 ℃, with stock available for quick delivery and low MOQ.
Browse More
Which companies do we supply
No matter how large the company is, no matter how many orders are placed, no matter how high your quality
requirements for castors are, we can meet your requirements
manufacturers
Whether heavy or light equipment and rollen cage and trolleys, we have a wide variety of castors.
OEM production
We provide OEM service. You can request to print your logo on the bracket and packaging business.
Maintenance
We are willing to cooperate with some equipment maintenance companies that need to replace castors.
E-commerce seller
We support low order quantity. We can supply castors and wheels for some e-commerce websites and sellers.
Spot stock
Dozens of caster types
prompt delivery
Send goods within 24 hours
Catalogue download
Keep an eye on the latest catalogue
Our popular castors
We will regularly update the castors that we have sold well recently.
